transcript: I'm starving, you wanna go to Panda Express? Yeah, let me get a bowl with the Super Greens, grilled chicken teriyaki, and the wok fried shrimp in a diet cup. Oh. Actually no, I changed my mind. Let's get a plate with the Super Greens, the grilled chicken teriyaki, and the firecracker steak and shrimp with the diet cup. Oh shit, I didn't even know you could order like that. Where'd you learn? The MenuFit app lets you know what to order at every restaurant to stay on track with your fitness goals. Damn, I'm gonna download the MenuFit app right now.
caption:
Comment "Fast Food" for me FREE fast food swap cheat sheet

Steal these two orders from Panda Express

Fit order 1:
Protein Bowl
Super Greens (Side) > Teriyaki Chicken > Wok-Fired Shrimp + Diet Coke
(660 calories 67 G protein)

Fit order 2:
Plate
Super Greens (Side) > Teriyaki Chicken > Firecracker Steak & Shrimp > Diet Coke
(690 calories 70 G protein)

Follow @sethgolie for high protein meal swaps

creator: @sethgolie
